```latex
\documentclass[11pt, a4paper]{article}
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[margin=1.2in]{geometry}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{fontawesome5}
\usepackage{enumitem}

% Color scheme
\definecolor{primary}{HTML}{2c3e50}
\definecolor{accent}{HTML}{2980b9}
\definecolor{secondary}{HTML}{7f8c8d}

% Header/Footer setup
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\fancyhead[C]{\color{primary}\large\bfseries John Doe - Senior DevOps Engineer}
\fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize\color{secondary}\thepage}

% Section formatting
\titleformat{\section}{\color{primary}\Large\bfseries}{}{0em}{}[{\titlerule[0.8pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.5\baselineskip}{0.8\baselineskip}

% Subsection formatting
\titleformat{\subsection}{\color{accent}\large\bfseries}{}{0em}{}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.2\baselineskip}{0.6\baselineskip}

% Custom commands
\newcommand{\contact}[3]{\makebox[2.2cm][l]{\faIcon{#1}~\color{secondary}#2} #3}
\newcommand{\hruleline}{\par\hspace{-\parindent}%
  \color{primary}\rule{\textwidth}{0.4pt}\par}

\begin{document}

\vspace*{-3em}
\begin{center}
\Huge\color{primary}\textbf{John Doe}\\[0.2em]
\Large\color{accent}Senior DevOps Engineer
\end{center}

\hruleline

\vspace{0.5em}
\begin{center}
\begin{minipage}{0.8\textwidth}
\centering
\contact{phone}{Phone:}{+1 (555) 123-4567}\\
\contact{envelope}{Email:}{john.doe@example.com}\\
\contact{linkedin}{LinkedIn:}{linkedin.com/in/johndoe}\\
\contact{github}{GitHub:}{github.com/johndoe}
\end{minipage}
\end{center}

\section*{\faIcon{user} Professional Summary}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,nosep]
\item DevOps Engineer with 8+ years experience in cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines
\item AWS Certified Solutions Architect with expertise in Kubernetes and Terraform
\item Proven track record in reducing deployment times by 70\% across multiple organizations
\end{itemize}

\section*{\faIcon{cogs} Technical Skills}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,nosep]
\item \textbf{Cloud Platforms:} AWS, Google Cloud, Azure
\item \textbf{Containerization:} Docker, Kubernetes, ECS
\item \textbf{IaC:} Terraform, CloudFormation
\item \textbf{CI/CD:} Jenkins, CircleCI, GitLab CI
\item \textbf{Monitoring:} Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack
\end{itemize}

\section*{\faIcon{briefcase} Professional Experience}

\subsection*{Senior DevOps Engineer | Tech Corp Inc. | 2020-Present}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,nosep]
\item Designed and implemented multi-cloud strategy saving \$1.2M annually
\item Led migration of monolith to microservices architecture using Kubernetes
\item Reduced CI/CD pipeline execution time from 45 to 15 minutes
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{DevOps Engineer | Innovate Solutions | 2017-2020}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,nosep]
\item Automated infrastructure provisioning reducing deployment time by 60\%
\item Implemented monitoring system decreasing incident response time by 40\%
\item Managed hybrid cloud environment across AWS and on-premise datacenters
\end{itemize}

\section*{\faIcon{graduation-cap} Education}
\subsection*{B.S. Computer Science | State University | 2013-2017}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,nosep]
\item GPA: 3.8/4.0
\item Coursework: Cloud Computing, Distributed Systems, Network Security
\end{itemize}

\end{document}
```
